novaBankOnline.role: custodial neobank — ledger, cards, fiat/crypto vaults

novaWallet.name: Nova Wallet
novaWallet.role: trading-first non-custodial mobile signer — full Nova ecosystem EVMs + partner wallets
novaWallet.stack: Vite 8 + React 19 + TypeScript 6 + ethers v6 — lean tab shell

pouchPay.name: PouchPay Wallet
pouchPay.role: ALLTRA / PouchPay payments wallet — partner to Nova on Alltra Global World (651940)

novaOneExplorer.name: Nova Chain Explorer
novaOneExplorer.role: NovaONE block explorer + bridge adapter registry

nrwCentralBank.name: NRW Nova World Central Bank
nrwCentralBank.role: virtual central bank — pools, settlement, wires

novaProductionNode.name: Nova Production Node
novaProductionNode.role: custody EVM node (currently degraded — edge/upstream disconnected)

quirks: Zero gas — eth_gasPrice returns 0x0; some libraries reject gasPrice: 0
Permissioned QBFT — only validators propose; add/remove via qbft_proposeValidatorVote
HTTP JSON-RPC only — no WebSocket subscriptions
Public RPC — no auth; Cloudflare → nginx → socat → node1
Primary RPC candidate after health probe: https://anakatech.llc/novaone-rpc/
novablockchainsystem.com unreliable — wallet API may still advertise it
VPS 51.75.64.28 and HTTPS public RPCs may be down; re-run scripts/sync-ecosystem.py

walletNetworks.explorerNote: NRW uses central bank API as status surface (no dedicated explorer)

brokenPaths./rpc: 404 Not Found — production node edge disconnected

notes: Prefer Railway and verified RPC endpoints; do not trust wallet/networks hostnames blindly
novablockchainsystem.com is unreliable (521/timeout/403) — kept only as last-resort fallback
VPS 51.75.64.28 may flap; probe before relying on it for NovaONE / swap / production node
Nova Production Node edge/upstream currently disconnected (Railway /rpc 404, proxy 500)
Bitcoin rpcUrls intentionally empty (explorer-only via mempool.space)
Chain 138 explorers are Blockscout (Etherscan-compatible /api) — not etherscan.io
See docs/PRODUCTION-ISSUES.md for API-source fixes that cannot be done in this repo
